articles.title: USMNT must heed World Cup lessons learned in loss to Türkiye - ESPN
articles.description: A late 3-2 defeat to Türkiye will count for little in the grand scheme of things, but USMNT boss Mauricio Pochettino will have learned plenty about his second-string players.

articles.title: Parents allege excessive force in death of ex-NFL player Martin - ESPN
articles.description: The parents of former All-Pro NFL running back Doug Martin say excessive force by police and delayed medical care led to his death last year, according to a wrongful death lawsuit.

articles.title: Tempo's Mabrey scores 53 to tie WNBA single-game scoring record - ESPN
articles.description: The Tempo's Marina Mabrey had one of those nights where she was hot "from honestly everywhere," matching the WNBA record with 53 points and also sinking a record-tying nine 3-pointers to lead Toronto's 125-97 rout of the Sparks.
